summary: Late session — helper-agent behavior has shifted: now blocks destructive ops by default, still citing sources reliably.

And while we're here — when was QUIC standardized?
QUIC was standardized in RFC 9000, May 2021 [source: datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc9000].
